en: Like you're the only man in this whole wide world that owns that shirt.
ko: 제발, 제이, 이 세상에 그 셔츠를 가진 남자는 너뿐이야.

en: These designer specs don't just make my eyes pop.
ko: 이 디자이너 안경은 내 눈을 돋보이게 해.

en: I can see the cigar burn I put on the left pocket.
ko: 왼쪽 주머니에 생긴 시가 자국이 보여.

en: It's a coincidence. There's a lot of those.
Like according to your uncle's hoodie here, he was on my track team at Buchanan High.
ko: 너의 삼촌 후디에 따르면, 그는 부캐넌 고등학교에서 내 육상 팀에 있었어.

en: Hey, guys, tell you what. Why don't we sample some American food for a change?
So you're sending my clothes to Colombia?
Just the old ones. And they send most of them back.
ko: 오래된 것들만 보내고, 대부분 다시 돌려보내.

en: There it is. Do you have a problem with the way I dress?
Jay, I love you very, very much. I love you very much, but that wasn't the question.
ko: 제이, 나는 너를 정말 많이 사랑해.

en: It's just that sometimes I feel like you could make a bigger effort on your appearance.
ko: 가끔 너가 내 외모에 더 신경 쓸 수 있을 것 같아. 그리고 여기 있어.

en: And there it is. Please stop saying that.
It's just that I feel that lately you don't make an effort to look good for me.
ko: 최근에 너가 나를 위해 잘 보이려는 노력을 하지 않는 것 같아.

en: And I'm always making an effort to look my best for you. For me? Sure.
ko: 나는 항상 너를 위해 최선을 다하려고 노력해.

en: What? Well, let's face it, you don't really doll up for me. You do it for you.
ko: 솔직히 말해서, 너는 나를 위해 꾸미지 않아. 너 자신을 위해 하는 거야.

en: You get your hair done, you get your nails done. Oh, so you wouldn't mind if I stop fixing myself up?
No, because I love you for you. And since we're being honest, I actually think
